
func (s *Server) handlePageDashboardPOSTRefresh(
	w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request,
) {
	if !s.checkIsDSReq(w, r) {
		return
	}

	sse := datastar.NewSSE(w, r, datastar.WithCompression())
	p := testapp.PageDashboard{
	App: s.app,
}
	body, err := p.POSTRefresh(sse)
	if err != nil {
		s.httpErrIntern(w, r, sse, "handling action PageDashboard.Refresh", err)
		return
	}
	if err := s.writeHTML(
		w, r, testapp.Session{}, nil, nil, body, nil,
	); err != nil {
		s.logErr("rendering response of PageDashboard.POSTRefresh", err)
		return
	}
}
